title: Add idempotent pr-merge already_satisfied mode
goal: Add an explicit opt-in already_satisfied mode for captain-run pr-merge retries without claiming that the current run performed the merge.

acceptance.assertion: Already-merged PRs are treated as already_satisfied only when an explicit idempotent mode is requested.
already_satisfied requires matching repo, PR number, expected_head, expected_base and current evidence bindings.
Default behavior continues to block pre-execution already-merged PRs.
Receipts distinguish already_satisfied from executed and do not claim performed execution.
Tests cover matching already-merged, mismatched head/base, missing evidence and default blocked behavior.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #104/#106 kept conservative blocking for already-merged PRs; retry idempotence remains useful.
